about.title: Our Legacy
about.content: Founded in 2001 in Tangier, SEBN-MA has grown from AWSM to a core part of the Sumitomo Electric Bordnetze Group. With over 20 years of expertise in Morocco, we are the backbone of automotive electrical systems.

list.name: Responsibility
list.desc: Taking ownership of our actions and results.

list.name: Respect
list.desc: Valuing every individual and our common environment.

careers.title: Join Our Team
careers.subtitle: Join 10,000+ professionals shaping the future of the automotive industry. We collaborate with local universities and engineering schools to develop the next generation of talent.

partners.title: Our Trusted Partners
partners.subtitle: We provide electrical systems for the world's most prestigious automotive brands.
